# calculator-ui

> Shared design tokens, Tailwind preset, and React chrome components for the @ecdaerol calculator suite

## Stack

- TypeScript, Next.js (App Router), React, Tailwind CSS
- Shared design system from `@ecdaerol/calculator-ui` and `tool-template`
- Also published as an npm library (calculation core extracted from UI)

## Architecture

- `src/app/`: Next.js routes — entry pages and layout
- `src/components/`: UI components (shared design system + page-specific)
- `src/lib/`: Calculation core — pure functions, no React. **This is the math.**
- `src/lib/index.ts`: npm library entry point

## Key files

- `README.md`: human-readable overview, formulas, references
- `package.json`: scripts (`dev`, `build`, `test`, `lint`)
- `src/lib/`: start here for engineering logic and validation
- `src/app/page.tsx`: main UI entry point

## How to navigate

- For *math* questions → read `src/lib/`
- For *UI* questions → read `src/app/` and `src/components/`
- For *standards/references* (ISO, DIN, VDI, Eurocode) → check `README.md` references section
